description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a PIP_CACHE_DIR variable pointing to a cache directory and uses the python:3.10-slim Docker image. Add a single job called upload_conan in the default test stage with a cache on the path cache. In that job run "mkdir -p cache", "chown -R $USER:$USER cache", "pip install -r requirements.txt", and "python -m conanpublish".
